name: Pawspring Pet Services Social Posts
description: Use a reusable template for pet services and products social posts with a fictional care studio, original conversion copy, photo-led service and retail variants, and intentional CSS geometry for badges, pricing panels, and source-neutral brand marks. Unsplash photos are passed through JSON image layers instead of being hardcoded into the template.
